title: CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: CITY OF EUGENE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, fields complaints, issues dog licenses, and enforces Eugene Animal Code. 300 Country Club Road Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 687-4060 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-4060 Animal Services Program Alternate (855) 328-1400 Dog licensing questions INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Eugene Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF EUGENE POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
